urdu transliteration text:
Na Rakh ab chadarxxxxxxEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Na rakh ab chadar bazuo petu neele daagh chupa naizahra ki jaa'n sharma nai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Zainab! Don’t be afraid to explain the pain inflicted upon you,
O Zainab! Don’t be afraid to describe the scars this pain has left

urdu transliteration text:
Tere nana ka ye roza haikoi kufa shaam ki raah naizahra ki jaa'n sharma nai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You are at the grave of your grandfather,
Not in the streets of Kufa or Shaam,

urdu transliteration text:
Jo chadar ujli thi teri rang uska kaise laal hua..ab sar pe tere aye shehzadi, wo kyu maujood rida nai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Bibi! How did you veil turn red?
O Princess, how did you lose your veil?

urdu transliteration text:
Atthara jo tere bhai the kis baat pe tujhse rooth gayedo shehzade kyu saath nahi, kyu saath abbas tera nai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Bibi! You had 18 brothers, where have they all gone?
Why aren’t your two young princes nor Abbas with you?

urdu transliteration text:
Ye kaun jawaan hai saath tere hai kapde jiske khoo'n se bhare..in zakhmo se ye choor hua, aankho'n se bhi khoo rukta nai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Who is this young man with you whose clothes are full of blood?
His body is covered in wounds, and there is blood flowing from his eyes as well

urdu transliteration text:
Kis haal mein karbal se aayi aye zainab apne shehr mein tuab iske siwa afsos hai kya, pehchaan saki sughra nai
@HujjatELC
english translation text: O Zainab, you arrived back in Madina from Karbala in such a state, that tragically even Sughra did not recognise you

urdu transliteration text:
Wo bacchi jisko seene pe shabbir sulaya karte themeri aakhein dhundh ke haar gayi, kahi'n milta uska pata nai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Where is that child whom Husain used to put to sleep on his chest?
My eyes have got tired looking for her, but I cannot find her anywhere
